narrative:
19 Ohio Senate district has 246,401 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.0% D−R vs -28.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
